news.summary: Netflix, Inc. is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 17, after the market closes. Analysts are anticipating earnings per share of $5.66, an increase from $5.28 in the previous year. The company is expected to reveal a quarterly revenue of $10.51 billion, up from $9.37 billion compared to last year. Over the past six quarters, Netflix has exceeded analyst revenue predictions and has outperformed estimates in eight of the last ten quarters. On Wednesday, Netflix's shares closed at $961.63, experiencing a 1.5% decrease. For more details and expert opinions on Netflix's stock, readers can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.
news.headline: Netflix (NFLX) to release Q1 earnings on April 17. Expected earnings per share $5.66, revenue $10.51 billion. Stock fell 1.5% to $961.63.
IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: Negative perceptions can affect the economy.

news.summary: Empire Offshore Wind LLC (Empire) is complying with a cessation order from the US government, leading to the safe suspension of offshore construction activities in the outer continental shelf waters for the Empire Wind project.
news.headline: Equinor suspends offshore construction activities for Empire Wind project following US government's halt work order by Empire Offshore Wind LLC.
IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: We do recognize that there is significant change in economic conditions. We expect to see policy pivots in other areas, including tax.
IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: Real economies are functioning and labor markets are quite strong.

news.summary: Meta, parent company of Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger, is facing antitrust proceedings by the FTC, alleging it violated laws by absorbing firms instead of competing. If ruled against, Meta may have to spin out its messenger services and social media sites. This could impact its ability to develop AI models, especially its proprietary Llama AI models. The case, ongoing since 2020, could last a few months to a year, affecting Meta's competitiveness in the AI race. Meta argues its acquisitions benefited users and that competition exists with platforms like YouTube and TikTok. The outcome could impact Meta's access to data for AI training and set precedent for tech firms facing antitrust scrutiny. If forced to separate companies, Meta may lose data-sharing abilities for AI training. The competition in AI development has intensified with Meta launching Llama 4 and significant investments in data centers. The ruling could impact the AI industry and set precedents for future antitrust cases against tech giants. The broader implications of the case could have lasting effects on tech conglomerates and AI development practices.
news.headline: Potential antitrust ruling against Meta may hinder AI growth. If court rules against, could be forced to spin out services as independent companies. Loss may impact Meta's competitiveness. Trial outcomes could impact standing in AI race. Antitrust case details and possible consequences. Meta's standing at risk.(pub date)
ECB ESTR forward rate seen below 1.5% for the first time since 2022.
IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: We see a sharp increase in uncertainty, but the fundamentals are still quite strong.
Philadelphia Fed names Anna Paulson new bank president effective July 1st, 2025.

news.summary: QKS Group has released an analysis of the global Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) Platform Market, predicting a compound annual growth rate of 24.09% through 2030. The reports, 'Market Share: Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) Platform, 2024, Worldwide & Regional Report' and 'Market Forecast: Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) Platform, 2025-2030, Worldwide & Regional Report', highlight the increasing importance of IoMT in healthcare. IoMT facilitates remote patient monitoring, personalized care, and real-time clinical decision support. Leading platforms are integrating AI, cloud, and cybersecurity to improve care delivery. Healthcare systems worldwide are adopting these technologies to enhance outcomes and reduce costs. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Global IoMT Platform Market is expected to grow at 24.09% CAGR through 2030, enabling remote patient monitoring & personalized care.

news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on April 17, 2025, Enlight Renewable Energy disclosed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2025, before the market commences on Tuesday, May 6, 2025. Known as a reputable renewable energy entity, Enlight is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol ENLT and on TASE under ENLT.TA.
news.headline: Enlight Renewable Energy to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 6, 2025; ended March 31, 2025.

news.summary: Bitcoin's price attempted to break above resistance at $86,000 on April 16, failing due to Fed Chair Powell's comments on rate cuts and Trump's tariffs. Since April 9, BTC price has ranged between $75,000 and $86,400 without closing above $86,000. The market believes unchanged interest rates are priced in, with just a 10% chance of a rate cut. Powell emphasized a cautious approach given tariff risks. Trump criticized Powell and hinted at his termination, while the market predicts a 46% chance of BTC hitting $90,000 by April 30. Bitcoin needs to surpass $86,000 to aim for $90,000, with $67,817 being the possible bottom. Investors are advised to conduct their own research before making any decisions.
news.headline: Bitcoin struggles at $86,000 resistance as Fed Chair dismisses rate cut hopes due to tariffs impact. Price stuck between $75,000 to $86,400 levels, with 88% odds no rate cut. Powell emphasizes wait-and-see approach and tariff risks. Trump criticizes Powell. Chance for Bitcoin hitting $90,000 on April 30 at 46%. Bulls need to flip $86,000 to target $90,000 and beyond, while bears aim for lows under $80,000. Analysts eye $65,000 as true bottom. No investment advice given.

news.summary: An independent marketing and analytics agency, Net Conversion, has been appointed as the "Media Agency of Record (AOR)" for Southeastern Grocers, LLC (SEG), the parent company of Harveys Supermarket and Winn-Dixie. Net Conversion will oversee media planning and buying, as well as provide media analytics and advanced analytics services to enhance customer loyalty, acquisition, and overall growth for SEG. Following a rigorous competitive review process, Net Conversion secured the position as the chosen agency.
news.headline: Net Conversion named media agency for Southeastern Grocers, handling media planning, analytics for Harveys and Winn-Dixie.

news.summary: In the upcoming fiscal year of 2026, the Trump administration is contemplating a significant reduction in vouchers as part of its budget plan.
news.headline: White House plans major cuts to housing aid, proposes reducing vouchers in 2026 budget.

news.summary: The latest data reveals that there has been a surge in COVID-19 cases in the state, with over 5,000 new cases and 100 additional deaths reported in the last 24 hours. This brings the total number of confirmed cases to more than 150,000, and the death toll has surpassed 3,000. Health officials urge the public to continue following safety protocols to curb the spread of the virus. Local hospitals are reportedly operating at near-capacity levels, raising concerns about potential strain on the healthcare system. The state government is considering implementing stricter measures to address the escalating situation. Stay updated for more information.
news.headline: Schwab exceeds expectations in trading amid market volatility, beating estimates - Reuters.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 8.9%, marking a significant increase from the previous quarter. This rise translates to over 2.3 million individuals currently out of work. Additionally, the report highlighted a 3.5% decrease in the GDP for the same period, indicating a struggling economy. The government has initiated measures to address this crisis, including a stimulus package of $15 billion aimed at creating job opportunities and boosting economic growth. Experts predict a slow but steady recovery in the coming months, contingent upon the success of these interventions.
news.headline: Dow Jones Industrial Average set to break historical divergence with S&P 500.

news.summary: Eliza Labs has launched auto.fun, a no-code platform enabling users to create and deploy AI agents on Web3 applications. Designed for non-developers, auto.fun supports AI agents interacting with social media, DeFi apps, and other Web3 services. Users can automate tasks like yield farming, social media management, and trading through simple commands. The platform emphasizes accessibility, with user education integrated to guide informed choices. Auto.fun also introduces "fairer than fair" token launches utilizing a bonding curve mechanism, giving project teams flexibility and resources while limiting token dump potential. The platform is open source, allowing users to verify agent operations and data use. Notable agents on auto.fun include FightFi for social media competition, Secret for launching tokens, Sigma Music Agent for connecting musicians and fans, and Astra for cross-chain payments.
news.headline: Eliza Labs unveils auto.fun, no-code AI on Web3 apps. Platform democratizes AI, supports DeFi with agent creation, deployment.

news.summary: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.1%. This decrease translates to approximately 900,000 new job opportunities created in various sectors. Additionally, the report shows that the GDP has grown by 6.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. These positive economic indicators have contributed to an overall increase in consumer confidence, with retail sales seeing a boost of 8.2% compared to the same period last year. Experts predict continued economic growth in the coming months, noting the government's initiatives to support businesses and employment.
news.headline: UnitedHealth's forecast cut surprises insurers, causing concern in the industry. #Insurance #ForecastCut
Crypto Fear & Greed Index: 30/100 - Fear
Fear & Greed Index: 19/100 - Extreme Fear

news.summary: The Mantra OM token experienced a drastic crash, losing over 90% of its value in a single day on April 13. The token plummeted from over $6 to below $0.50, wiping out more than $5 billion in market cap. Various theories surrounding the collapse emerged, including rumors of insider dumping, forced liquidations, mislabeled wallets, and exchange manipulation. Mantra had secured a $1 billion deal to tokenize Dubai-based Damac Group's real estate and data centers, and the token had hit an all-time high of nearly $9 in February 2025. The company denied allegations of insider trading and a rug pull. Mantra's CEO blamed centralized exchanges for the crash, which was triggered during low-liquidity hours. Investigations revealed coordinated large-scale deposits and withdrawals across exchanges. Mantra planned a token buyback and burn program post-crash. Laser Digital denied ownership of wallets linked to the crash. The cause of the crash remains under investigation by an unnamed blockchain analyst.
news.headline: OM token lost over 90% of its value in a day, plummeting from $6 to under $0.50, wiping out $5B market cap. Chaos ensues in crypto world.

news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida on April 17, 2025, Raymond James is emphasizing its commitment to artificial intelligence by introducing its exclusive AI Search technology. This new tool, fueled by generative artificial intelligence, allows financial advisors and associates to ask questions in a natural language format to access the firm’s extensive internal knowledge base. Stuart Feld, the recently appointed chief artificial intelligence officer, indicated that this innovation aims to enhance service quality by providing accurate and customized information.
news.headline: Raymond James invests in AI with launch of proprietary AI Search technology, enhancing service with intuitive natural language questions to knowledge base.
Russian Foreign Ministry: Russia protests to Japan over drills near Russian border.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Partners Value Investments Inc. (TSXV: PVF.WT) announced that their non-voting exchangeable shares will begin trading on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol “PVF.A”. The trading is set to start on April 17, 2025. The Exchangeable Shares have been assigned CUSIP number 70214W104 and ISIN number CA70214W1041. TSX Trust Company will serve as the transfer agent for these shares.
news.headline: Partners Value Investments Inc. plans to list non-voting exchangeable shares on TSX Venture Exchange as "PVF.A" on April 17, 2025.
